name: Remote MCP Server with Auth (Cloudflare Template)
what_it_does: Official Cloudflare reference implementation of a remote MCP server with OAuth 2.0 authentication — demonstrating how to deploy authenticated remote MCP servers on Cloudflare Workers, with proper OAuth flows, token validation, and secure remote MCP deployment patterns for production agent integrations.
use_cases: Learning how to build secure remote MCP servers with OAuth from developers
Using as a template for deploying authenticated MCP servers on Cloudflare Workers
Understanding MCP remote transport and auth patterns from MCP developers
Bootstrapping production remote MCP deployments with authentication
Reference implementation for implementing MCP OAuth spec from framework builders
Testing MCP client authentication flows against a reference server
not_for: Running as a production MCP server with real tools (it's a template/example)
Teams who need pre-built tool functionality (build on top of this template)
best_when: A developer building a remote, publicly-accessible MCP server needs a production-quality reference for OAuth authentication on Cloudflare Workers.
avoid_when: You're building a local MCP server or don't need authentication — use simpler MCP templates.

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow. Demonstrates token validation and scope checking. Template includes example identity provider integration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free template; Cloudflare Workers free tier: 100,000 requests/day
pricing.paid_tiers: Cloudflare Workers paid plans for higher volume
pricing.notes: Template is free and open source. Deployment on Cloudflare Workers has a generous free tier. Official Cloudflare reference implementation.

performance.rate_limits: Cloudflare Workers: 100K requests/day free; configurable on paid plans

known_agent_gotchas: This is a template — you must add your own MCP tools on top of it
Cloudflare Workers deployment required — not portable to other platforms without changes
OAuth identity provider (Auth0, etc.) setup required for full auth flow
Template uses Cloudflare Durable Objects for state — understand DO pricing
Official Cloudflare template — highest quality but may lag latest MCP spec changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced globally (Cloudflare CDN). OAuth 2.0 with proper token validation. Official Cloudflare implementation. Secrets managed via Cloudflare Worker Secrets. Best practice example for secure remote MCP deployment.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS via Cloudflare globally. OAuth 2.0. Official Cloudflare implementation. Secrets via CF Worker Secrets. Best practice reference.
